title: Task-graph pack v1
description: Versioned prerequisite DAG for domain routing. Aligns with cloud TaskRouter ConceptNode / TaskGraph: concepts, prerequisite edges, and pack-owned advance/remediate thresholds (sole source — consumers must not hardcode duplicates). Graph MUST be a DAG; validateGraph() runs a Kahn topological check and rejects cycles with an ordered cyclePath of concept ids, plus unknown concept references at load. Committed golden outcomes live under fixtures/golden-packs/ (valid DAG, cyclic reject, missing-node reject).

schemaVersion.description: Locked format id for task-graph packs.

domainId.description: Domain id matching AgentProfile.domainId / track vocabulary.

concepts.description: Bounded concept set (NFR — no unbounded scans).

edges.description: Prerequisite DAG edges. type=prerequisite means fromConceptId requires toConceptId.

thresholds.description: Mastery hysteresis — sole source for ADVANCE/REMEDIATE (aligns with task_router.py defaults 0.85 / 0.40).

advanceThreshold.description: Posterior mastery mean at or above this advances (default 0.85).

remediateThreshold.description: Prerequisite mean below this triggers remediation (default 0.40).

edge.description: Directed prerequisite edge. Self-loops and cycles are rejected by validateGraph() with an ordered cyclePath of concept ids.

toConceptId.description: Prerequisite concept that must be mastered first.

type.description: Edge type for v1 — only prerequisite DAG edges are defined.
